## Final Accepted Amendments

### `fr-8-1bebf4fa`

finding_summary: The scenario mocks ignore the adapter working directory, so tests built on this fixture will still pass even if production code forgets to point `br`/`bv` at the temp workspace.
severity: medium
affected_files:
- src/test_support/e2e_fixtures.rs:419-425
- src/test_support/e2e_fixtures.rs:575-659
remediation_hint: Thread `MockBrCall.working_dir` / `MockBvCall.working_dir` into the scenario handlers and fail on a missing or mismatched path, or return adapters that are already bound to `fixture.workspace.path()` so cwd wiring is part of what the fixture validates.
